# hrobot_ssh_keys (Data Source)

List all SSH keys stored in the Hetzner Robot account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# All SSH keys stored in the Robot account.
data "hrobot_ssh_keys" "all" {}

output "ssh_key_fingerprints" {
  value = [for k in data.hrobot_ssh_keys.all.ssh_keys : k.fingerprint]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `ssh_keys` (Attributes List) All SSH keys. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ssh_keys))

<a id="nestedatt--ssh_keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ssh_keys`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `data` (String) The public key material.
- `fingerprint` (String) Key fingerprint (the identifier used by the Robot API).
- `name` (String) Key name.
- `size` (Number) Key size in bits.
- `type` (String) Key algorithm (e.g. ECDSA, RSA, ED25519).
